core_concept: 神秘組織的數位基礎設施與異界實體的融合
composition_hint: 將資料庫介面與異界實體的細節並置，強調科技與未知的對比
potential_subjects: A digital interface displaying anomalous data streams
A mysterious entity emerging from a corrupted server
A security control panel with emergency lockdown protocols
